items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of 'Cancellation with access until period end', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the outcome of this scenario or any related checks. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include specific validations or results related to this cancellation scenario, leading to an inconclusive status. Without clear evidence of the scenario's behavior or outcomes, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is satisfied.
